title: Implement AI-powered automatic clip generation functionality

requirements.text: Create a backend function generateClipsAutomatically that accepts a YouTube video ID and returns an array of auto-generated clip suggestions, each containing start timestamp, end timestamp, title, and viral score

quotes: It still dont have the ai

acceptanceCriteria: Backend function accepts videoId as Text parameter
Function returns an array of clip objects with startTime, endTime, title, and viralScore fields
Function generates 3-5 clip suggestions per video based on video analysis logic
Each generated clip has a unique title describing its content
Viral scores range from 0-100 based on clip characteristics

requirements.text: Implement the useAutoGenerateClips hook in frontend/src/hooks/useAutoGenerateClips.ts to call the backend generateClipsAutomatically method and return the generated clips using React Query

quotes: It still dont have the ai

acceptanceCriteria: Hook accepts videoId as a parameter
Hook uses React Query's useMutation to call the backend actor's generateClipsAutomatically method
Hook returns mutation object with mutate function, data, isLoading, and error states
Hook properly handles loading and error states
Generated clips are returned in a format compatible with the ClipSuggestions component

requirements.text: Add a 'Generate AI Clips' button to the VideoUrlForm component that triggers automatic clip generation when a valid YouTube URL is entered

quotes: It still dont have the ai

acceptanceCriteria: Button is displayed after a valid YouTube URL is submitted
Button triggers the useAutoGenerateClips hook with the current video ID
Button shows loading state while clips are being generated
Generated clips are passed to the parent component or stored in state for display in ClipSuggestions
Button is disabled during generation to prevent duplicate requests

requirements.text: Update the App.tsx component to integrate automatic clip generation into the video workflow, storing generated suggestions and passing them to the ClipSuggestions component

quotes: It still dont have the ai

acceptanceCriteria: App component manages state for AI-generated clip suggestions
Generated clips are passed to ClipSuggestions component for display
User can trigger AI generation after loading a video
Generated suggestions persist until a new video is loaded
Component handles errors from the generation process gracefully

constraints: Use the single-actor architecture pattern in backend/main.mo
Do not modify immutable frontend paths including useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, and components/ui
Use React Query for all backend API calls
Maintain consistency with existing viral score calculation patterns
nonGoals: Integration with external AI services or APIs
Real-time video analysis using actual video content processing
